title: Bioinformatician / AI x BIO
text: NIST is seeking a Bioinformatician to develop Artificial Intelligence (AI) bioinformatic workflows to analyze complex flow cytometry and genomics data. Key responsibilities include collaborating with cross-functional teams to extract insights from large datasets, optimizing machine learning models, and communicating technical findings to diverse stakeholders. This notice is issued under direct-hire authority to recruit talent to occupations for which NIST has a severe shortage of candidates.
